min_band_score.description: Minimum band_score to keep a window from window_band_calls.

merge_windows_bp.description: Two adjacent windows are merged when the gap between them is <= this many bp.

window_band_calls.description: Per-window band call rows with band_score (one row per window).

l3_contingency.description: Per-site L3 contingency hits (chrom, pos, optional site_id).

dosage_summary.description: Per-bin dosage summary (chrom, start, end, optional bin_id).
